LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

PETITION GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER AND A SEPARATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT WHICH RECITES ALL THE TERMS OF RELIEF MADE IN THE ARBITRATION AWARD AND MUST EMAIL THEM TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. calendar.matters:
Re-Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petition granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for petitioner is required to prepare a proposed order and a separate proposed judgment which recites all the terms of relief made in the arbitration award and must email them to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-16-2020 Off Calendar
